{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heaven's Glory School token
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory School token]] is made of polished [[orus wood]] and bears the school's mark: three crossed swords on top of a blazing sun with clouds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
